data.content: Planning complete. Start implementation in the Knots worktree by landing the enum/registry/builtin-workflow changes first, then add the new `loom/execution_plan_sdlc` bundle and extend command-level tests that prove `kno new --type execution_plan` resolves to the builtin workflow with `autopilot` as default and `semiauto` available. The main integration risk is incomplete builtin registration across init/doctor/profile code paths.
